concept_summary: A simple early math game where the player fulfills bakery orders by tapping pastry tiles to build an exact total. The target order value is visible at all times. The player wins only when the built total matches the order exactly. Overshooting is a visible failure state that resets the tray.

core_mechanic.feedback_loop: The order target and running tray total stay visible the whole time. A correct tray highlights green and clears the order. An overshoot highlights amber, clears the tray, and asks the player to try again.
core_mechanic.player_action: Tap pastry tiles to add their values to a running tray total, then commit the tray when the total matches the order exactly.

prerequisites_candidate: understanding that adding more increases a total

target_skill.description: Compose a target total within 10 by selecting addends deliberately instead of guessing or tapping randomly.

title: Bakery Rush Mini
